creator: freebsd@spambox.dk
text:
When trying to install this port, the following message is shown:
--cut--
# make install
===>  Installing for razor-agents-2.84_1
===>   razor-agents-2.84_1 depends on package: p5-Net-DNS>=0 - found
===>   razor-agents-2.84_1 depends on package: p5-Digest-SHA1>=0 - found
===>   razor-agents-2.84_1 depends on package: p5-URI>=0 - found
===>   razor-agents-2.84_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.18.4 - found
===>  Checking if razor-agents already installed
===>   Registering installation for razor-agents-2.84_1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/razor-admin.1.gz: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/razor-check.1.gz: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/razor-report.1.gz: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/razor-revoke.1.gz: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man5/razor-agent.conf.5.gz: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man5/razor-agents.5.gz: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man5/razor-whitelist.5.gz: No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents.
--cut--

The files are indeed missing in the above directories, but some of them is in another directory:
--cut--
# find /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work -iname "*.gz"
/usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/man/man3/Razor2::Errorhandler.3.gz
/usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/man/man3/Razor2::Syslog.3.gz
/usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/man/man3/Razor2::Preproc::deHTMLxs.3.gz
/usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1  blib/man5 /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man5/razor-report.1.gz
/usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1  blib/man5 /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man5/razor-revoke.1.gz
/usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1  blib/man5 /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man5/razor-admin.1.gz
/usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1  blib/man5 /usr/ports/mail/razor-agents/work/stage/usr/local/man/man5/razor-check.1.gz
--cut--

I'm not sure what is wrong here, please help.
